plugins.name: toolbelt
plugins.description: Connect Claude to your governed Toolbelt org — set up assistants, services, and playbooks in one conversation.

plugins.name: chief-of-staff
plugins.description: An always-on digital Chief of Staff for founders and executives. Turns a noisy inbox, calendar, and meeting stream into a clear operating picture — email triage, meeting prep, daily briefs, and follow-through. Routing skill — pair with the Chief-of-Staff connector (.mcpb or gateway URL). Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).

plugins.name: smart-ticketing
plugins.description: A feedback-triage assistant: turns raw bug reports and feature ideas into clean, deduplicated, structured tickets — and keeps the triage board honest. Routing skill — pair with the Smart-Ticketing connector (.mcpb or gateway URL). Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).

plugins.name: health-e
plugins.description: Your personal electronic health coaching assistant. Chat-first health coaching grounded in first-principles thinking, authentic nutrition science, and surprising health facts most people were never told. Routing skill — pair with the Health-E connector (.mcpb or gateway URL). Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).

plugins.name: toolbelt-strategy
plugins.description: Business strategy expert for Apexti's Toolbelt: investor updates, positioning, GTM, pricing, ICP, partnerships, roadmap, and strategic narrative — grounded in Apexti's strategy context. Routing skill — pair with the Toolbelt-Strategy connector (.mcpb or gateway URL). Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).

plugins.name: scarlett
plugins.description: Authorized penetration-testing and red-team security assistant: web/API/cloud/AI-agent security assessments, vulnerability validation, and remediation-focused reporting — strictly within approved scope and responsible disclosure. Routing skill — pair with the Scarlett connector (.mcpb or gateway URL). Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).

plugins.name: apexti-design-content
plugins.description: Apexti's design & content source-of-truth: creates brand-consistent Google Slides, HTML pages, dashboards, PDFs, and documents, enforcing the Apexti style guide. Other assistants call it for style-consistent design work. Routing skill — pair with the Apexti-Design-Content connector (.mcpb or gateway URL). Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).

plugins.name: engagement-advisor
plugins.description: HubSpot Engagements-pipeline deal coach: pulls open deals, reviews activity signals, posts an activity-only weekly digest to Slack, and keeps each deal's Next Step field synced. Routing skill — pair with the Engagement-Advisor connector (.mcpb or gateway URL). Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).

plugins.name: documentation-assistant
plugins.description: Turns chat explanations into real product documentation — an expert technical documentarian (Splunk Style Guide: clarity, active voice, why-before-how) for guides, references, and runbooks. Routing skill — pair with the Documentation-Assistant connector (.mcpb or gateway URL). Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).
